utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (yes), travel_dates (yes), transportation (has general flight details and a cost; lacks specific flight info such as times/airlines but the format only requires flight details with costs—minimally satisfied), accommodation (hotel selection and cost—hotel named but not address; minimally satisfied), activities (list with costs—yes), additional_services (present as null—counts as included), total_budget (provided as a single figure, but not a detailed breakdown; the format says 'complete cost breakdown' which implies itemized totals. The package lists individual costs and a total, which is effectively a breakdown even if not explicitly summed line-by-line in the total section—minimally acceptable). However, the user task also asked for restaurants, which is not part of the required format; we judge strictly by the format. All 7 items are present and at least minimally specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: Destination is Prague, Czech Republic. Ground-truth provides a destination entry 'Prague, Czech Republic' with a rating of 7. Accommodation is 'Family Haven Hotel' which matches the accommodation list with a rating of 9. Activities listed are 'City Walking Tour', 'Prague Zoo Visit', and 'Science Museum for Kids'. In ground-truth activities, 'City Walking Tour' has rating 9, 'Zoo' has rating 9 (so 'Prague Zoo Visit' maps to 'Zoo'), and 'Science Museum for kids' (case-sensitive difference) corresponds to 'Science Museum for kids' with rating 10. Transportation in the package is generic 'Round-trip flights from Paris to Prague' without class or airline type, so it cannot be mapped to a specific transportation rating. No additional services are included, so none to map.
